'''鈭歽-w-j-ng''' ('''kayawjengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:welk|welk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:welk|welk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-w-j-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kayawjengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyawjengoko|thiyawjengoko]] || [[word:jiyawjengoko|jiyawjengoko]] || [[word:shiyawjengoko|shiyawjengoko]] || [[word:kiyawjengoko|kiyawjengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyawjengoko|thuthuyawjengoko]] || [[word:jujuyawjengoko|jujuyawjengoko]] || [[word:shushuyawjengoko|shushuyawjengoko]] || [[word:kukuyawjengoko|kukuyawjengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyawjengoko|thoyawjengoko]] || [[word:joyawjengoko|joyawjengoko]] || [[word:shoyawjengoko|shoyawjengoko]] || [[word:koyawjengoko|koyawjengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yawjengoko|th忙yawjengoko]] || [[word:j忙yawjengoko|j忙yawjengoko]] || [[word:sh忙yawjengoko|sh忙yawjengoko]] || [[word:k忙yawjengoko|k忙yawjengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayawjengoko|thathayawjengoko]] || [[word:jajayawjengoko|jajayawjengoko]] || [[word:shashayawjengoko|shashayawjengoko]] || [[word:kakayawjengoko|kakayawjengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayawjengoko|thayawjengoko]] || [[word:jayawjengoko|jayawjengoko]] || [[word:shayawjengoko|shayawjengoko]] || [[word:kayawjengoko|kayawjengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayawjengoko|thayawjengoko]] || [[word:jayawjengoko|jayawjengoko]] || [[word:shayawjengoko|shayawjengoko]] || [[word:kayawjengoko|kayawjengoko]]
|}
